title: The Goofy Script: A TBS Addon
description: A resource pack to make TBS victim footage into a clown show: goofy textures, silly sounds and more!
body:
**This requires The Broken Script by Wendigodrip to work**

---
**This is The Goofy Script, or TGS. A resourcepack to make the mod a sort of anti-horror
What's anti-horror? Its scary and spooky but at the same time, it's hillarious to run away from horrors beyond your comprehension.**

---

**_Built by The Tinman (and no other), if anybody steals my content, let me know._**

TGS is built specifically for small friend groups playing with TBS that want to watch each other run away while laughing their ass off, which was my inspiration for the modpack, doing it with my friends. I decided to export my finished product here, after realizing its comedic potential and seeing enthusiastic responses to it in Wendigodrip's official discord server.
Make suggestions there for now, I usually don't implement them because of the resource pack limitations and the fact that they don't really line up with what I have in mind for TGS.

Currently only compatible with the 1.20.1 versions of the mod, and I've only tested it on 1.9.3 and derivatives. **IN NEOFORGE VERSIONS IT WILL NOT WORK**
Important to note that 1.9.4 "for forge", the **cancelled** 1.9.4 build, it will probably not work as intended, as I'm pretty sure they started organizing their assets slightly differently. Anyone asking for help and using "1.9.4 for forge" will be ignored. It is probably the buggiest version to date.

1.9.7 soon, despite my fatwa on it because of TACZ nerf and no-fun-allowed invincible entity approach. Not enough of you are using THE BEST version, so I'll cope and make it for there too...

1.9.3 and dervatives will still be updated because that's what I play with my friends and has TACZ on it, until TACZ is ported over to neoforge and that silly TACZ nerf still up, this will stay.

Not yet :(
Soon there'll be a marketable version, _soon_
